utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. (3) transportation: fully detailed with airline, departure/arrival airports, class, price, currency, baggage, cancellation—complete. (4) accommodation: fully specified with property name, type, rating, guest rating, cost, currency, and amenities—complete. (5) activities: included with name, duration, cost, currency, difficulty, and guide info—complete. (6) additional_services: includes dining details (restaurant name, cuisine, cost, currency, dietary needs)—complete. (7) total_budget: includes total cost, currency, budget limit, and remaining—complete. All 7 items are covered and fully specified.
